name: HMS ML 229 (ML 229)
events: 23 Sep 1943 HMS Tantivy (Cdr. M.G. Rimington, DSO, RN) and HMS Sea Rover (Lt. J.P. Angell, RN) both shifted from Larne to Holy Loch. She was escorted by HMS ML 229 (T/Lt. W.C.R. Walsh, RNVR). (1)

11 Dec 1943 Off Dundee HMS ML 229 (T/Lt. W.C.R. Walsh, RNVR) took over the escort. HMS Unrivalled (Lt. H.B. Turner, DSC, RN), HMS Trident (Lt. P.E. Newstead, RN) and ML 229 then continued on to Blyth.
6 Jan 1944 HMS Spirit (Lt. A.W. Langridge, RN) shifted from Larne to Holy Loch. She was escorted by HMS ML 229 (T/Lt. W.C.R. Walsh, RNVR). (2)
7 Feb 1944 HrMs O 19 (Lt.Cdr. A. van Karnebeek, RNN) shifted from Leith to Dundee. She was escorted by HMS ML 229 (T/Lt. W.C.R. Walsh, RNVR). (3)
7 Apr 1944 Around 1700 B/7, HrMs O 21 (Lt. F.J. Kroesen, RNN) departed from Dundee for Holy Loch. She was escorted out by HMS ML 229 (T/Lt. W.C.R. Walsh, RNVR).

At sea HrMs O 21 then joined the new constructionn submarine Voracious (Lt. F.D.G. Challis, DSC, RN) and her escort, the new construction corvette HMS Knaresborough Castle (Lt. J.R. Freeman, RNR) which were coming from Blyth. (4)
9 Apr 1944 HMS Satyr (Lt. T.S. Weston, RN) shifted from Dundee to Blyth. She was escorted by HMS ML 229 (T/Lt. W.C.R. Walsh, RNVR). (5)

11 Apr 1944 HMS Ursula (Lt. A.G. Davies, RN) conducted gunnery exercises off Dundee with HMS ML 229 (T/Lt. W.C.R. Walsh, RNVR) and A/S exercises off Methill with HMS ML 201 (T/Lt. G.T. Bruce, RNVR) and HMS HDML 1070 (T/Skr. J. Clark, RNR). (6)
13 May 1944 HMS Satyr (Lt. T.S. Weston, RN) shifted from Blyth to Dundee. She was escorted by HMS ML 229 (T/Lt. W.C.R. Walsh, RNVR). (7)
7 Jun 1944 Around 0700 B/7, HMS Upright (Lt. J.A.L. Wilkinson, RN) departed Blyth for Dundee where she arrived around 2000 B/7. She was escorted by HMS ML 229 (T/Lt. W.C.R. Walsh, RNVR). (8)
16 Jun 1944 HMS Trusty (Lt. L.E. Herrick, DSO, RN) departed from Dundee for Edinburgh where she is to participate in D/F experiments. She is escorted by HMS ML 229 (T/Lt. W.C.R. Walsh, RNVR). (9)

7 Jul 1944 HMS Tuna (A/Lt.Cdr. L.F.L. Hill, RNR) departed Blyth for Port H.H.Z. She was escorted by HMS ML 229 (T/Lt. W.C.R. Walsh, RNVR) until 1551/7 when HMS Castlenau (Skr. W.K. Mickleburgh, RNR) took over the escort. (10)
24 Jul 1944 Varne (Lt. I.G. Raikes, DSC, RN) shifted from Blyth to Dundee. She was escorted by HMS ML 229 (T/Lt. W.C.R. Walsh, RNVR). (11)

25 Jul 1944 Varne (Lt. I.G. Raikes, DSC, RN) departed Dundee for Holy Loch. She was escorted by HMS ML 229 (T/Lt. W.C.R. Walsh, RNVR) until 2045 hours when she joined HMS Shalimar (Lt. W.G. Meeke, DSC, MBE, RN) and her escort HMS Shikari (Lt. E.H.U. Cautley, RNVR) for onward passage. (11)
26 Aug 1944 HMS Trusty (Lt. L.E. Herrick, DSO, RN) departed from Dundee for Rosyth where she arrived later the same day. She is escorted by HMS ML 229 (T/Lt. W.C.R. Walsh, RNVR). (12)
15 Dec 1944 HrMs Dolfijn (Lt.Cdr. J.B.M.J. Maas, RNN) proceeded from Dundee to Leith. She was escorted by HMS ML 229 (T/Lt. W.C.R. Walsh, RNVR). (13)
18 Dec 1944 HrMs Dolfijn (Lt.Cdr. J.B.M.J. Maas, RNN) proceeded from Leith to Dundee. She was escorted by HMS ML 229 (T/Lt. W.C.R. Walsh, RNVR). (13)
28 Dec 1944 HrMs Dolfijn (Lt.Cdr. J.B.M.J. Maas, RNN) conducted attack exercises off Dundee during which HMS ML 229 (T/Lt. W.C.R. Walsh, RNVR) acted as target. (13)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
